results.rendered_html:
loma am Ende einiger comp. = loman  P. 5,4,75 . 4,1,85, Vārtt. 8 .  VOP. 6,24 . 76 . ajalomaiḥ  TS. 5,1,6,2 . Nach  JAṬĀDH. _im_ ŚKDR.  soll loma n. Schweif bedeuten.
— Vgl. ajalomī, atiloma, anu˚, antarloma, ava˚, uḍulomāḥ (unter uḍuloman), golomī, nirloma, pāṇḍulomā, pratiloma, bahirloma, vyāghra˚, su˚.
